name_cn:
￼ !!️
Hobo star chain bag grey denim series
Brand new grey denim fabric, premium and durable
Box bag shape design, soft and lightweight silhouette
Equipped with an adjustable long shoulder strap, greatly enhancing practicality
Classic star logo circular charm, another highlight
Exquisite and cute, an irresistible bag style
size:28.5*10*14.5cm p0030920680
